The '''Trade Federation cargo hauler''' was a [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ship]] class used by the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]].<ref name="RP" />

==Characteristics==
The cargo haulers were "control ships" in the [[Trade Defense Force]] and had poor viewing capabilities above and below the ship. Such vessels resembled the larger [[Lucrehulk-class battleship/Legends|LH-3210 cargo haulers]] though they were classified as midsized and were smaller. Like the LH-3210 cargo hauler, the vessel was manufactured by [[Hoersch-Kessel Drive, Inc./Legends|Hoersch-Kessel Drive, Inc.]], which later made a considerable number of the [[Confederate Navy/Legends|Confederate Navy's]] capital ships.<ref name="RP" />

==Known ships==
